subject: kylian-mbappe

hook.spoken_hook: 24 years since Senegal stunned France. Tonight Mbappé answered.

scenes.voiceover: 2002. Defending champs France. Senegal 1-0. Biggest WC shock ever.
scenes.graphic_prompt: 2002 World Cup poster style, France vs Senegal, bold gold text on black, 'THE SHOCK' watermark

scenes.voiceover: 24 years later. 66 minutes. Mbappé breaks the deadlock. Clinical.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Mbappé vs Senegal, goal moment, gold score 1-0 between them, black background gold accents

scenes.voiceover: Dembélé off, Barcola on. Sub wins it. Mbappé assist, Barcola finish. 2-0.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Barcola vs Senegal, celebration, gold score 2-0 between them, black background gold accents

scenes.voiceover: 90+5. Mbaye pulls one back. Senegal sniffing a point.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Senegal player scoring late, gold score 2-1, tension, night stadium atmosphere

scenes.voiceover: One minute later. Mbappé again. Answer delivered. 3-1. 2002 ghost exorcised.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Mbappé brace celebration, gold score 3-1 between him and Senegal crest, black background gold accents

scenes.voiceover: Group I after matchday one. France top on three. Norway-Iraq next. Can Les Bleus go all the way?
scenes.graphic_prompt: Group I table: France 3pts, Norway 0, Iraq 0, Senegal 0. France row highlighted gold. Night stadium background.

scenes.voiceover: Daily World Cup stories. Subscribe — don't miss the next one.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Mbappé celebration close-up, gold confetti burst, 'DAILY WORLD CUP' bold, black background gold accents

comment_bait: France to win Group I — yes or no? Make your case 👇
cta: Follow for your daily World Cup stories

thumbnail.concept: Mbappé face close-up, gold confetti, '3-1' scoreline, 2002 ghosted behind him fading

youtube_title: France 3-1 Senegal: Mbappé Brace Avenge 2002 Shock | World Cup 2026 Group I
youtube_description: France open their World Cup 2026 campaign with a 3-1 win over Senegal at MetLife Stadium — 24 years after the Lions of Teranga stunned Les Bleus in the 2002 opener. Kylian Mbappé scores twice (66', 90+6'), Bradley Barcola adds a third (82'). Group I standings and what it means for the road ahead. #WorldCup2026 #France #Senegal #Mbappe #TikiTakaFootyTV
